title: chapimod's
description: a mod based on the Chatpitaine community
body:
This mod is by [Chapitaine](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQeAjN7rIYanFYlAK4W9JXg), 
specifically for his "[Je code vos idées](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zQvPfAJlxnA&list=PLphTM5jTLti_GGp0Jmsh_Q3n4fAF8WWy2&pp=gAQB)
" series. It incorporates ideas suggested to him in the "[Je code vos idées](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zQvPfAJlxnA&list=PLphTM5jTLti_GGp0Jmsh_Q3n4fAF8WWy2&pp=gAQB)" episodes on his YouTube channel ([Chapitaine](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQeAjN7rIYanFYlAK4W9JXg)).


<details>
<summary>episode1</summary>

The turtlejet is a flying, rideable creature that drops an iron block.


</details>

<details>
<summary>episode2</summary>

A dog disguised as an edible hot dog; once eaten, you receive a very strong effect.


</details>

<details>
<summary>episode3</summary>

A shiny Chansey with 250 HP that drops a lucky egg that maxes out your food bar.


</details>

<details>
<summary>episode4</summary>

A blue Pikachu that throws snow.


</details>

<details>
<summary>episode5</summary>

A house that walks, but you can't live in it.

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode6</summary>

A super powerful sword, but when you hit something, the sword breaks.

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode7</summary>

a red skeleton with a red mushroom on its head, and when it shoots at you, it inflicts an effect that reduces your health.

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode8</summary>

A slime with arms, or when it kills other slimes, it grows and becomes stronger.

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode9</summary>

A magnet that attracts all nearby creatures and helps guide the Turtlejet.

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode10</summary>

flamethrower hoe

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode11</summary>

Big Explosive Potato

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode12</summary>

wand of destruction launches a purple ball that destroys everything in its path

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode13</summary>

Money cat For Each diamond or emerald you give makes the player stronger.

</details>

<details>
<summary>episode14</summary>

A GUN !!!

</details>
And more...
